raw_description:
This 4-star luxury hotel is located in Al Taawun Street, Al Mamzar Area. It features a rooftop swimming pool, a sauna and a fully equipped gym.

The hotel offers spacious rooms with flat-screen TVs and air conditioning. All of the Hotel Sharjah Palace rooms have an en suite bathroom with a hairdryer.

The Sharjah Palace Hotel’s restaurant offers a varied buffet of European, Chinese, Arabic, Indian and Far Eastern cuisine, steaks and seafood. La Fontana serves coffee and hot drinks in a relaxing lounge area.

Guests can relax in the hotel’s sauna or play pool in the Generations Club. A hot tub and massage treatments are available to soothe your muscles after a long day.

Dubai’s centre and Sharjah Expo Centre are within walking distance.The Hotel Sharjah Palace is just 6 km from Dubai International Airport and 20 km from Sharjah International Airport.

description: Experience clinical levels of high-end luxury at Sharjah Palace Hotel. Located conveniently in its prime location, this property features 10 key amenities including Indoor swimming pool, Free WiFi, Free parking.
